scores.justification: Methodology rigorous and claims calibrated to evidence (pre-registered tests, power floors, post-hoc flags, honestly withdrawn robustness claim; nothing changed at v11); the one named weakness stands: the class-level trainability comparison remains ordering-only at the shipped budget, with the significance sweep deferred to camera-ready.

Well-organized 28-page build with 0 overfull hboxes and 0 broken refs; the v10 defect (transposed Figure 1 caption clause) is fixed and verified against the rendered figure and generating script, so captions are now self-contained and internally consistent.

Solid but deliberately narrow for the Cooperative AI community: an NE-transparent parametric benchmark, a per-cell-baseline methodological lesson, two honestly retired predictors, and a machine-verdicted social-trap target constitute useful methodological infrastructure in a niche the paper itself bounds; unchanged at v11.

The parametric phase-diagram-with-computable-NE framing is new; the closest prior line is now engaged beyond its anchor papers (population-based RPS evaluation, meta-game estimation, equilibrium-selection matrix games), all resolver-verified, with the measurable-equilibrium-convergence credit explicitly ceded and the claim scoped to the parametric-family property on a live-search basis.

Code, seeds, hyperparameter pins, frozen scenario IDs, parity manifest, and per-figure recipes supplied and carried byte-identical from the v10-verified state; held below full because the baseline-checkpoint hosting is still in progress and one statistic traces to a non-regenerable PR recomputation — both carried operator tasks the NeurIPS checklist expects resolved by submission.

findings.rationale: The NeurIPS checklist expects the hosted-baselines pathway resolved, not 'in progress' (carried from v10).
findings.suggested_fix: Complete or remove the HuggingFace hosting promise before submission.

findings.rationale: The class-ordering headline is ordering-only; a NeurIPS reviewer will ask for the significance test the paper itself names as the camera-ready gate.
findings.suggested_fix: Run the cross-class 4x-budget significance sweep before submission.

findings.rationale: The submission artifact is the extended version of record (28pp); the 4-page workshop body specified by the section-1 footnote must still be produced.
findings.suggested_fix: Compress per the footnote's stated section split before the deadline.
